_comment_top: Brand Profile template. Copy this file, rename to <agent-slug>.json (e.g. kim-smith.json), fill in the fields, and place in this directory. Then invoke the skill with: /zillow-clone <URL> as <agent-slug> with full kit and host it
_comment_tier: tier values: 'per-listing' (dual-branded, footer shows 'Listing Kit by getoios.com', deploys to <slug>-kit.netlify.app) OR 'monthly' (full white-label, no OIOS branding, deploys to custom_domain)
_comment_domain: REQUIRED if tier=monthly. Agent owns this subdomain. CNAME record points *.listings.brokerage.com at Netlify load balancer. Auto-provisioned SSL via Let's Encrypt.
footer_tagline: Brokerage Name · Paducah's trusted real estate · Equal Housing Opportunity
